question.text: GTC (Good Till Cancelled) and GTD (Good Till Date) orders are currently:

answer.text: Not available on the system as per SEBI directives

explanation.text: **The Logic:** GTC and GTD orders are currently not available on Indian exchanges as per SEBI directives. Similarly, AON and MF orders are also not available. **The Trap:** These order types exist conceptually but are not implemented on Indian exchanges. **Cross-Exam Context:** Order availability restrictions are tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Currently available time conditions: DAY and IOC only.
